message:
test(search-core): add 50 tests for embedder and lexical response modules

Expand embedder.rs from 34 to 71 tests covering:
- ModelTier: Hash trait (3 distinct in HashSet), Debug all variants
- ModelInfo: serde roundtrip, Debug, Clone trait bound, defaults
  (available=false, provider=None, supports_batch=true)
- EmbeddingResult: serde roundtrip, Debug, is_hash_only edge cases
  (Hash tier with non-empty vec, empty vec non-Hash tier)
- HashEmbedder: Default trait, Debug, empty batch
- RegistryConfig: Default values, serde roundtrip, Debug
- ModelRegistry: deactivate_embedder, set_config, list_available,
  hash_embedder accessor, quality→fast→hash fallback chain, Debug
- Cosine similarity: similar vectors (>0.99), negative values
- normalize_l2: idempotent, single element
- Well-known models: minilm_l12, e5_small, e5_base, bge_small,
  bge_base, openai_small (6 new)
- embed_document: agent kind, project kind, different policies

Expand lexical_response.rs from 28 to 41 tests covering:
- Snippets: at end of text, multiple terms (first match wins),
  ellipsis when match far in, short text no ellipsis
- Highlights: empty terms list, adjacent matches, field name
  propagation
- Word boundary: snap past end, snap at zero, snap at space,
  snap already at space
- Constants: SNIPPET_MAX_CHARS and SNIPPET_CONTEXT range checks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
